name: Art
description: Artists bring unique skills in communication, imagination, and cultural influence vital for making AI safety tangible and urgent.

people.name: Holly Herndon
people.description: Creates art exploring human-AI collaboration and has been a leading voice on ethical AI use in creative industries.

people.name: André Piza
people.description: Manages research communities that explore digital twins and human-AI collaborative workflows as a creative medium.

people.name: Sunil Manghani
people.description: Treats human-AI collaboration as a medium to ensure creators remain the final arbiters of ethical and creative integrity.

trajectory: Visual communication and storytelling skills are desperately needed to convey AI safety concepts to broader audiences.
Speculative design and science fiction thinking help explore possible AI futures and make abstract risks concrete.
Human-AI collaboration as a creative medium provides firsthand insight into AI capabilities and limitations.
Cultural influence through art can shift public understanding and political will around AI safety.

projects.title: Visualize AI safety concepts
projects.description: Create visual explanations, infographics, or interactive art that makes AI alignment concepts accessible to non-technical audiences.

projects.title: Human-AI collaboration ethics study
projects.description: Document and analyze collaborative creative workflows between humans and AI to develop principles for maintaining human creative agency.

projects.title: Design public engagement campaigns
projects.description: Create art-based campaigns that help communities understand and engage with AI safety issues in their own contexts.
